subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! In the clear text of the Qur'án it is proclaimed: "Whosoever is wrongfully slain, We have indeed granted authority unto his heir" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان در صریح قرآن میفرماید من قتل مظلوما لقد جعلنا لولیه سلطانا
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @relationship between government and people, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
